deck.title: Portfolio Minimal Signature Pack
deck.audience: Agent skill maintainers comparing HTML deck production quality
deck.outcome: Show that Knowledge Cat can turn a style seed into a reusable HTML template pack with QA evidence.
deck.main_promise: A style seed becomes benchmark-grade only when it becomes layouts, artifacts, and checks.
deck.narrative_spine: Benchmark gap -> pack contract -> layout proof -> QA gate -> next pack sequence

style_prompt_profile.name: kc-24 - Polished Minimal Portfolio
style_prompt_profile.selected_prompt: Strict grid, top-left nav, huge numbers, black/gray palette, negative space, portfolio-grade restraint.
style_prompt_profile.visual_dna: Architectural minimalism with high whitespace, compact metadata, thin rules, monochrome grids, and dark reset slides.
style_prompt_profile.palette: Light gray #f2f2f0, white, black #050505, muted gray #666660.
style_prompt_profile.typography: Inter or Helvetica-like sans with huge numbers and compact mono metadata.
style_prompt_profile.texture_material: Flat digital paper, no gradients, no decorative texture.
style_prompt_profile.composition: Strict grid, asymmetric split pages, image/list sections, timelines, logo grids, and decision endings.
style_prompt_profile.text_in_image_policy: All exact slide text stays as HTML text; images are proof surfaces only.
style_prompt_profile.safety_normalization: No protected template assets or brand-owned layouts are copied.

assumptions: Fixture-level SVG screenshots are acceptable until a browser capture tool is available.
This case study demonstrates mechanism readiness, not a client deck for an external brand.

slides.action_title: A style seed becomes real only after it has a pack
slides.key_message: The target is not more style words; the target is reusable HTML production.
evidence: style-template-library.md defines kc-24 as the P0 HTML signature pack target
slides.visual: Sparse hero with top-left nav and compact metadata

slides.action_title: The benchmark gap is template depth, not taste
slides.key_message: Guizang is strong because it turns visual taste into templates, layouts, and checks.
slides.visual: Proof stamps around one restrained claim

slides.action_title: Fourteen layouts give the pack enough reuse surface
slides.key_message: A pack needs more than a cover and a content slide; it needs enough roles to build a deck.
slides.visual: Oversized layout count with a short explanation

slides.action_title: A proof wall makes the visual system inspectable
slides.key_message: Local images are owned by named slots so the deck can be checked and repaired.
slides.visual: Strict image grid with local SVG proof surface

slides.action_title: Each visual choice must carry a deck job
slides.key_message: The pack keeps image treatment tied to evidence, process, or audience shift.
evidence: html-visual-systems.md requires visible image slots and distinct slide jobs

slides.action_title: The library now routes style by deck job
slides.key_message: Forty-four styles become useful when the agent can choose one by audience and lane.
evidence: style-template-library.md maps deck jobs to style seeds

slides.action_title: The shortest path to ninety-nine is staged
slides.key_message: First lock Portfolio Minimal, then Data Story, then editorial and product packs.
evidence: style-template-library.md names the P0 and P1 pack sequence
slides.visual: Vertical timeline from kc-24 to kc-11

slides.action_title: A dark reset reveals the system behind the slides
slides.key_message: The pack connects SKILL routing, style library, template, case study, and checks.
evidence: run_checks.py now includes signature-pack checking after integration

slides.action_title: The pack turns taste into three repeatable moves
slides.key_message: Choose a style seed, bind it to layouts, then prove it with QA artifacts.
evidence: portfolio-minimal README states the pack contract
slides.visual: Three-column operating model with huge step numbers

slides.key_message: The pack can show approved marks or text references without inventing fake logos.
slides.visual: Text-only logo grid with approved-reference posture

slides.action_title: The old Cat had guidance; the new Cat has a pack
slides.key_message: The improvement is a concrete production surface that a future deck can reuse.
slides.visual: Two-column contrast divided by a heavy vertical rule

slides.action_title: The next move is to browser-capture this pack
slides.key_message: The deterministic pack is in place; actual browser PNG capture is the final evidence upgrade.
evidence: qa-report.md labels current visual artifacts as fixture-level
slides.visual: Centered decision statement with next evidence point
